# laroux.js Application

> A React Server Components application built with laroux.js on Deno 2.x

## Tech Stack

- laroux.js: Zero-configuration RSC framework
- React 19: UI library with Server Components
- Deno 2.x: Runtime
- Tailwind CSS 4.x: Styling

## Project Structure

- /src/app/routes/ - Page components
- /src/app/layout.tsx - Root layout
- /src/components/ - Reusable components
- /public/ - Static assets

## Getting Started

```bash
deno task dev    # Start development server
deno task build  # Build for production
deno task serve  # Serve production build
```
